Notes: CSP LaViolette MVP of NSIC tournament.  CSP wins second NSIC title.
CSP #30 Tewes fouled out at 6:09/2nd.  MSUM #22 Rettke fouled out at 4:06/2nd.
Game.Officials: Amy Brighton,  Ben Franson,  Randy Wolden
